Itemized  ·  Procedures  ·  DXA bone density scan  ·  Texas

DXA bone density scan cost in Texas.

Cash-pay range for dxa bone density scan across 24 hospitals in Texas: $24 to $46,473. CPT code 77080. Pulled from each hospital's federally-mandated price transparency file.

Cheapest in Texas
$24
UT Southwestern Medical Center
Dallas, TX
vs.
Most expensive in Texas
$46,473
HCA Houston Healthcare Kingwood
Houston, TX
